AddressInfo.Title: ZES - Oksijen O68 İstanbul Yönü
AddressInfo.AddressLine1: Oksijen O68 İstanbul Yönü Tesisi, Engürücük Mahallesi, 16600 Gemlik/Bursa
AddressInfo.AccessComments: On 068 Izmir-Istanbul highway, right past the shops at the facility, on the right at the parking lot

GeneralComments: New, clean, fast energy of the Turkey roads. Download ZES Mobile App to apply and then you can easily find the nearest charging station and get their information.
